==About==
===Broadcast Talent===
''To be determined.

===Format===
* '''Gauntlet Season 2''' : ''Oct 6th - 13th
** 32 teams
** Squad, {{Abbr/TPP}}
* '''Semi Finals''' : ''Oct 6th - 11th
** 32 teams from ''Closed Qualifiers
** 4 groups of 8 teams
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for Grand Finals
* '''Grand Finals''' : ''Oct 12th - 13th
** 16 teams
** 2 matchdays
